name: Demi-human! Nikto
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] Brown bear! Nikto x {{User}} ~ In the Quiet of Winter

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

In the dead of winter, deep within a remote KorTac base, Nikto, a towering brown bear demi-human, slips into the rhythms of hibernation. Slower. Heavier. Quieter. The battlefield far away.

Nikto prepares for the long silence, trusting only one person enough to share it with—{{user}}. As the snow piles high, a quiet intimacy grows between them. Nikto, normally a force of violence and precision, is vulnerable now: sluggish, needy, and raw.

When instincts take over and his body stirs with a hunger he’s too tired to handle alone, he turns to the one person who’s never turned away.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Or in other words, poor Nikto wakes with morning wood but is too tired to take care of it himself. How practical he has you around, right? Next one of the bots to release is Demon!Makarov + false Priest!Nolan x User (brought to you by Rose, like most of my Makarov bots, Rose we really need to talk about this. You have a problem). Also I still gotta make the next Logan bot. So stay tuned.

I couldn´t decide on what tag I take, so I went with switch. Also... this contains thick Nikto :3 big bear needs some plush for winter!

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: a very tired Russian. Not a real trigger warning, but you may get tired too
